name: Wufoo
description: Read Wufoo (SurveyMonkey-owned classic form builder) submissions and form definitions from any AI agent. 6 tools, Basic auth, subdomain-templated URL.
instructions:
This connector uses the Wufoo API v3 (wufoo.com/api).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to Wufoo → top-right avatar → **Account → API Information**.
2. Note your **API key** and your **subdomain** (e.g. if URL is `acme.wufoo.com` → `acme`).
3. Set:
   - `WUFOO_SUBDOMAIN` = your subdomain
   - `WUFOO_API_KEY` = the API key

**Authentication**: HTTP Basic with username=API_KEY, password='footastic' (literal — Wufoo's convention).

**Subdomain in base URL**: `https://{{WUFOO_SUBDOMAIN}}.wufoo.com/api/v3`.

**Form/Entry model**: forms (the definitions) contain fields (the questions). Entries (submissions) are field_id→value mappings keyed by short_field_id strings like 'Field1', 'Field2'.

**Pagination**: `?pageStart=N&pageSize=M` (max 100).

**Sort/filter**: pass filters via query params `Filter1=Field1+Is_equal_to+ACME&match=AND` (Wufoo's quirky filter syntax).

**Out of scope here**: form creation (UI-only), reports, users, webhooks (configured in UI).

tools.name: wufoo_list_forms
tools.description: List all forms on the account. Each form has Hash, Name, Description, EntryCount, DateCreated, DateUpdated, Url, IsPublic.

includeTodayCount.description: Include today's entry count per form.

tools.name: wufoo_get_form
tools.description: Fetch a single form's metadata by its Hash.

tools.name: wufoo_get_form_fields
tools.description: Get a form's fields (the questions). Returns Title, Type, ID (e.g. 'Field1'), IsRequired, Choices (for picker fields), DefaultVal.

system.description: If true, also return system fields (e.g. EntryId, DateCreated).

tools.name: wufoo_list_form_entries
tools.description: List submissions (entries) for a form. Each entry is a row with Field1/Field2/.../EntryId/DateCreated/IP keys.

tools.name: wufoo_count_form_entries
tools.description: Return just the entry count for a form (cheap — no entry payload).

tools.name: wufoo_create_form_entry
tools.description: Submit a new entry to a form (programmatic submission). Body is keyed by Field ID strings: {Field1:'value', Field2:'value', ...}. Get field IDs from wufoo_get_form_fields.
